lines.text: I spotted them! Over there!
Forgetting someone, are we?
What a special specimen...
Time to have my men take {Male=him;Female=her} back to the camp...
Wait a moment, traveler... While you may harbor doubts, I implore you not to disrupt their pilgrimage.
Perhaps staying silent now would better serve your interests.
Preach with respect and patience, lest you induce doubt and confusion.
Yes, they have. Would you like them now, or shall we deliver them to your residence before tonight?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: …Of course. I'll have someone fetch them immediately. It won't take long.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Welcome to Masked Reverie. From masks to elegant garments and splendid stage props, we craft it all to order. How may I help you today, my dear?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Hehe, so eager to skip the pleasantries, are we? I'm right here. Do I seem invisible, or are you simply ignoring me? I am... right behind you.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Step forward.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: What burdens weigh upon your soul?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Are you certain? Search your heart.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: What do you wish to confess?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes
The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: May the Sentinel grant your absolution. Go in peace, and transgress no more.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Now, I shall open the path to your ascension.
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Gilberto, how are things progressing?
lines.quest_name: The Sacred Breeze So Often Breathes

lines.text: Aha. Perfect… There's still a Gondola here. I believe your name is… Noah, right?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: It seems fate has brought us together once more. Don't you agree? Kind {Male=sir;Female=lady}.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: It seems you do remember me. That's right. We crossed paths at Madame Nyarla's mask shop.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Truth be told, I need to catch the final train in the Nimbus Sanctum today. However, this lone Gondola is all the harbor offers.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: So… since we share the same destination, would you mind also sharing this Gondola with me?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Much obliged.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Well, then. Without further ado, let's be on our way.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: It seems we have some time before the train arrives. How about a little chat to pass the time?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Well, then. Where shall we begin?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: "The city, an abomination of chaos, claims its first death at birth. Its mortality has become our sustenance, like a whale that slowly sinks into the abyss."
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: This comment on Ragunna comes from Rosselli, a painter from the past. Tragically, he died in poverty, his work overlooked. Now, ironically, even a mere sketch of his commands over a million Credits.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Now. What is your impression of Ragunna so far?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Passionate... Indeed. Passion is a quality the Ragunnesi possess in abundance. It's also why the Carnevale is so eagerly anticipated.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Indeed. Ragunna is not as glamorous as it seems. Beneath the veneer of prosperity, avarice reigns supreme.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Indeed, faith is Ragunna's crown jewel. Our devotion to the Sentinel stands unrivaled throughout Rinascita.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: A most prudent response. Perhaps you're still acquainting yourself with Ragunna, or you simply prefer discretion. Either way, I take no offense.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Ragunna has many facets. Most people only see one side of it, but for me—
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: It's like two sworn enemies are forcibly bound together. That's Ragunna—a city where tradition and innovation, openness and isolation, ceaselessly wrestle for dominance.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: That is why the Montelli and Fisalia families are in a constant clash, as you may have seen.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: The Montellis champion innovation, staking all on the Carnevale. Meanwhile, the Fisalias cling to tradition, colluding with the shadows that lurk in Ragunna's depths.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Fortunately, this long struggle behind the curtains will soon come to an end. Not because of the two families, but because of you.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Yes, you. The Fated One. Perhaps you're not merely entangled in Ragunna's conflict, but are, in fact, the very eye of the storm. The city's fate may well rest upon your shoulders.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: You may have not noticed it yet, but we are... and have been in the same boat for a long time.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Ah. There's the train. It's time to say goodbye now.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I'll tell you next time. As for now, let's keep it a mystery.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Until we meet again, Fated One. May you find your own path in Ragunna.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: {Male=Lord;Female=Lady} Arbiter… I have heard… thy call…
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I have awaited thee… for what seems like an eternity…
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: {Male=Lord;Female=Lady} Arbiter… I am ensnared...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Beyond the clouds and among the stars... thou shalt find an inverted tower suspended in the sky—I am there, watching over Solaris from above.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The Lost... doth wander briefly amongst thy kind...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Seek her out… She, too, doth move within the folds of this festival...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The next move is… hmm, am I getting this right? It feels a bit off...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: You are…
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: No, never mind… Anyway, your performance was splendid!
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I'm here for the Carnevale as well. It's been ages since I've seen something as grand as this.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I love hearing the laughter and cheers of a crowd, no matter the occasion.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Kind stranger, could you show me those final steps from your curtain call?
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I'm sorry, but I can't stay here any longer. I must return...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: My name? It's… um…
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: {Male=Lord;Female=Lady} Arbiter… I have heard… thy call…
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: I have awaited thee… for what seems like an eternity…
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: {Male=Lord;Female=Lady} Arbiter… I am ensnared...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Beyond the clouds and among the stars... thou shalt find an inverted tower suspended in the sky—I am there, watching over Solaris from above.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The Lost... doth wander briefly amongst thy kind...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Seek her out… She, too, doth move within the folds of this festival...
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Phrolova, you do have a knack for indulging in... pointless little chores.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Never before have I seen a day so steeped in both shadow and light.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: The birds sing, the flowers bloom… yet this world knows neither true joy nor eternity.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Come closer, Righteous One, there's no need for hesitation.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Stand down.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: I apologize for the small mishap on behalf of the Montelli Family. And...
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: What a pleasant surprise to see you again so soon.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Yet your expression betrays no surprise, {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: —Please, lower your weapon. There is still room for discussion, is there not, Miss Carlotta?
lines.quest_name: Veils Off in Sun or Shadow

lines.text: Well, well, if it isn't {PlayerName}, the famous Champion and Laureate!
Got yourself into some trouble?
Wanna take a look?
Okay, then! Here you go...
Try some! I hope these candies can make up for not showing you my impressive claws.
You're welcome! Do come by to see our liondance show tomorrow!
Hmm... you smell unfamiliar, yet so powerful, and so pure...
You must be that famous Rover.
Hiya! I've heard a lot about you, and now I finally get to meet you in person.
Lingyang! Come here!
Forgive me for not meeting you properly until now.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Guest from the Black Shores, Laureate of the Carnevale, savior and friend of the Montellis... {PlayerName}, your presence is an honor.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Well said. But the rules are not set in stone, are they?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Hah... These old, creaky bones of mine.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Did I offend you? Or are you just chasing down every passing soul... Never thought the Montellis would grow so aggressive.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Forgive me for not meeting you properly until now.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Guest from the Black Shores, Laureate of the Carnevale, savior and friend of the Montellis... {PlayerName}, your presence is an honor.
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Well said. But the rules are not set in stone, are they?
lines.quest_name: If On a Rainy Night a Family

lines.text: Woodrow, I have the results for the issue you asked me to look into.
Cough... water, water... Please...
I... I thought it was the end.
Yes, I did. I'm Yuni. I didn't expect Lollo Logistics to really make it here. Thank you so much.
Hm? Aren’t you that Rover? Are you interested in this poster?
Stop pretending. I can sense that you’re interested.
A showdown with a wanted criminal always attracts real experts. I knew it! This is the most effective recruitment trick.
Oh, I almost forgot. I am the head of the Center for Wutherological Climate Studies, Huaxu Academy. You can call me Professor Woodrow.
You'd better hold off on that. If you fail the verification too many times, the console will lock, and the system will shut down automatically.
If that happens, we'll only waste more time in the rebooting.
Scar only needed the two of you as his audience. We already knew what he wanted, and we let him have as much.
No detail is too small. I'm sure {Male=he;Female=she} understands. Besides... Not seeing the opponent heightens the thrill of the game.
If everything goes according to the prophecies of Jué, I will meet {Male=him;Female=her} in person eventually.
So... What did our captive from the Fractsidus tell you about Jué?
Well, that is... unexpected. But you don't seem all that surprised, do you?
Where was it when you last sensed its presence?
The place where the first people of Jinzhou lived, and where Jué first manifested before us humans... I see.
Our enemies could have planned it as a trap. We have a bigger goal to focus on, remember?
Would you let what you heard from Scar sway your determination?
And that's your final answer?
What do you make of this, Jiyan?
Maybe you are right.
The rain just happened out of nowhere. It's indeed unusual. But...
This is our only chance.
The enemy we've been yearning to destroy is finally right before us.
And now you're asking me to sit back and do nothing because of some Phantoms?
Silence... Is this your response? Or is it fear holding your tongue?
Ah... I see. You’re no different. We fear, we bleed, we suffer, and in the end, we'll all die on the battlefield.
But what about your brethren, friends and comrades? As you witness them viciously slain before your eyes, one by one...
Will you still remain silent when their souls demand an answer?
There is no other choice. We must trample the pile of corpses at our feet and push on. Keep barking orders, keep fighting until every last one of those monsters is gone.
The Retroact Rain merely creates illusions of past events. My soldiers will not succumb to those hallucinations. I will not allow it.
We'll crush anything in our path, no questions asked.
And I will pave the way for us all with my Forte.
If tens, hundreds, thousands more of my men will die… So be it. We will win this battle, by any means necessary.
Jiyan, I have a question for you... What would you have done on that day, if you were in my position?
Whatever you say... I'll never answer those brave souls with such silence and cowardice.
Pardon the intrusion. {Male=My Lord;Female=My Lady} {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: That won't be necessary.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: To keep our honored guest waiting would be… most improper.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Especially when it was I who extended the invitation.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: If this world can't be changed, then maybe it's time to take a different path... even if it's nothing like before.
I'll do whatever it takes to help you achieve your goal. We stand in the same place, and I've already shown you that what you seek is within reach.
Chuuu...
Chuuu… Chuuuu…
Hmph...
Some uninvited guests have arrived.
Do not worry. The path... has already been laid.
At last... finally...
Before my power is spent, I have little time left.
The only choice now is to force the Heliogyre to a standstill.
The last of its strength I will share with you, so fade you will not. But you must hurry.
Before that, take this memory to {Male=him;Female=her}.
Take it to the one they call "Arbiter."
Ah, it seems my hastily chosen pawn has proven to be utterly ineffectual. It appears I'll have to add the final flourish to push the story to its climax.
But no matter, no matter. I'll simply chalk this up as a poor judgment call. A band of fools who enacted a farce.
Such a pity, though. With this piece expended, the chapter where the girl forms her bond with the Threnodian must be delayed.
But that is a tale to be savored later. Right, {PlayerName}?
Guest from afar, you possess eyes as clear as crystal.
But... what troubles you so, that eyes once bright as the highland sky now darken with rolling clouds.
...A warrior who walks the blade's edge does not falter over trifles.
The clouds, if I may guess, are cast from the throne...
At the peak of Capitoline Hill, beneath the pale walls of the Ephor's Palace... secrets lie buried. And the most intricate among them are those born from the pursuit of power.
Even one as honorable as the Ephor must learn when to be ruthless.
In Septimont, a city forged in iron and blood, anyone who seeks the throne without knowing the cost is no better than a lamb marching to the butcher's knife.
They burned in despair, resentful of the Order's verdict till their last breath. Their last work is nothing but a curse upon us all!
"With our bodies to fuel the fire, the ensuing inferno shall forge Ragunna's true gold." Is it saying Ragunna will burn to the ground??
They wanted their resentment to echo through the streets... Just by reading this, I can almost see their terrifying faces in the fire!
Well... it would appear they were possessed by Daemons, just as this very article suggests.
Life... is but a walking shadow.
A poor player, who struts and frets his hour upon the stage... and then is heard no more.
It is a tale told by fools, full of sound and fury... Signifying nothing.
Phrolova, when this piece is truly complete, I'll come back.
Is that a promise?
Yes. No matter where I am, I'll return.
Every promise matters. Once I make one, I'll see it through, no matter the cost.
Hi {PlayerName}! Want to feel the thrill of the ride in total safety? You should try our motorbike simulator!
It's an AI-powered training system that we, the Biomatic Club, built with the Psychological Threshold Alternative Therapy Society. Right now, we're looking for test riders!
The thing is—the simulator's grown an attitude and is being super selective about its riders, which is exactly why we need a skilled rider like you!
I've sent you the coordinates. This is a new version still under wraps, so it's a totally new experience guaranteed!
Hi {PlayerName}! Want to feel the thrill of the ride in total safety? You should try our motorbike simulator!
It's an AI-powered training system that we, the Biomatic Club, built with the Psychological Threshold Alternative Therapy Society. Right now, we're looking for test riders!
The thing is—the simulator's grown an attitude and is being super selective about its riders, which is exactly why we need a skilled rider like you!
I've sent you the coordinates. This is a new version still under wraps, so it's a totally new experience guaranteed!
Ha, ha, ha! Don't bother looking for it!
If you're heading for Tempest Cliffs, head east. This path will take you straight to the courtyard of glory.
Or perhaps, would you care to travel with me?
After all, we share the same destination. Your reputation precedes you, honorable {PlayerName}.
Augusta...
It's been a while, Rinascita.
What prey do we hunt this time?
...The Threnodian.
—And it found the strength to raise its sword and seal the Threnodian away. Lahai-Roi was saved. What a relief!
Hello, Rover.
The system has recognized that you have embarked on a unique journey, with your own companions and narrative.
As previously instructed, I will set up a test for you in the Jinzhou wilderness.
Once you pass the test, a key to the unknown will reveal itself to you.
I promise to stand by you unwaveringly as you begin your journey, and as you grow stronger, I will grant you access to more keys to unravel the mysteries that lie ahead.
There are countless unexplored parts of the world waiting for you, and I hope you’re prepared to embrace the unknown.
I wish you a pleasant journey.
Hello, Rover.
The system has identified multiple references to you in various folk tales, and your adventure continues.
As previously instructed, I will set up a test for you in the Jinzhou wilderness.
Once you pass the test, a key to the unknown will reveal itself to you.
Wishing you success on your test and may your travel go smoothly.
Hello, Rover.
The system has concluded that you have explored this realm and honed your physical and mental capabilities.
As instructed, I will set up a test for you in the Jinzhou wilderness.
Once you pass the test, a key to the unknown will reveal itself to you.
The responses you provide could potentially shape the future of SOL-3.
I hope you will enjoy your journey.
May joy also be upon you, {PlayerName}.
The Sovereign is dead. Now we pause in our victory to honor the Hero of Heroes, and all those who stood by her side.
Ahem.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: That was an absolutely brilliant duel.
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: I appreciate your perspective, Professor Anslem.
But according to Royan calculations, this launch window is the best we've had in decades.
HQ... this is Lynae...
Sorry Overseer... we were... ambushed...
Don't worry... I'll make it to Startorch Academy in Lahai-Roi in time...
I'll complete the mission... assigned by the Grand Architect...
...Protect the sun.
Useless fool.
I told you to destroy the Heliogyre. Completely.
Save it. I don't want to hear your excuses.
At this point, our entire plan has fallen apart because you screwed up. And to think, I went out of my way to get a pass for you to the New Federation.
Ugh. You're lucky the one at the top gave someone as pathetic as you one last chance.
There's the other visitor in Bjartr Woods now, correct? Some crippled scientist.
Find her. Make sure she... doesn't make it back to the Collective.
